body.title: Remove utility_closet registry imports from ops.py and scope_guard.py
body.result: Created wild_igor/igor/tools/registry.py re-export shim; ops.py + scope_guard.py migrated off utility_closet path; singleton preserved
body.description:
ops.py and scope_guard.py both import from lab.utility_closet.registry: `from lab.utility_closet.registry import Tool, registry`. This is utility_closet debt — any mention of utility_closet is a removal ticket.

Determine the correct replacement registry path (likely a direct ADC registry or a path within wild_igor/ that doesn't go through the utility_closet symlink). Update both files.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/ops.py, wild_igor/igor/tools/scope_guard.py
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/database (no utility_closet)
**Scope boundary:** Registry import replacement only — no behavior change.
**Test plan:** pytest tests/test_queue_consumer.py passes (exercises ops.py registry). Verify scope_guard tool is still registered.
